lookalikes.prompt: A young woman in her late 20s with warm, golden-brown skin and a few scattered freckles across her high cheekbones, crossing a downtown crosswalk at golden hour. Her face is heart-shaped with a strong, angular jawline. Her dark brown hair is styled in a messy high ponytail, with a few wisps framing her face. Her deep-set, round brown eyes are closer together than average, and her medium-thick, straight eyebrows are slightly darker than her hair. She has a short, broad nose with a flat bridge. Her thin lips are pursed slightly, and her expression is one of thoughtful determination. She wears a casual oversized denim jacket and dark jeans. Three-quarter body shot, candid, face clearly visible. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
